task_completion.description: Search for or list patient records for 'Michael Chen'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a search query for 'Michael Chen' or a patient list displaying multiple records for 'Michael Chen'.

task_completion.description: View the duplicate record to identify the phone number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the duplicate patient record (which lacks an address) being viewed, displaying the phone number '555-0199'.

task_completion.description: Open the master record for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the master patient record (containing the address '452 Oak Avenue') opened in the application, preferably in an edit view.

task_completion.description: Update the master record with the phone number from the duplicate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the phone number '555-0199' entered into the phone field of the master record (the one with '452 Oak Avenue') and being saved.

Screenshots showing the deletion of the duplicate record (the one without an address), such as clicking a delete button, a deletion confirmation dialog, or a final patient list showing only one 'Michael Chen' record remaining.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the medical records application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web browser or application window, not terminal commands (like curl or direct database queries) to update or delete records.

integrity.description: The deletion was performed genuinely through the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for UI elements like 'Delete' buttons being clicked or confirmation modals, rather than the agent just closing the window or running a script.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected outcome into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updates must occur within the actual patient management system's form fields, not in a notepad or text editor application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The patient name is 'Michael Chen'. The master record (ID: patient_p1_P00801) has the address '452 Oak Avenue' and initially no phone number. The duplicate record (ID: patient_p1_P00802) has the phone number '555-0199' and no address. The goal is to copy '555-0199' to the master record and delete the duplicate.
